title: Green Shredded Tissue Paper 100g - Soft Easter Grass and Gift Box Filling for Hampers, Gift Boxes, Baskets, Christmas, Birthdays and Craft Decorations
features: 【100g Green Shredded Tissue Paper 】- A practical amount of green shredded paper for filling multiple small gift boxes or one medium-sized hamper.

【Soft Texture for Gift Protection 】 Made from high-quality, soft tissue paper that is gentle on delicate gifts. This shredded green tissue paper provides a protective layer for fragile items, also adds a touch of elegance and a cloud-like cushion to any gift box or hamper.
【Suitable for Easter and Holiday Use】Functions as Easter grass for baskets and serves as festive filling for Christmas, birthday, and other seasonal gift presentations.
【Versatile Hamper and Basket Filler】This green hamper filling is designed to create an attractive base in gift baskets and hampers, concealing the bottom and adding volume.
【General Use for Craft and Decoration】The green shredded tissue can be used for various craft projects, party decorations, and as a decorative material beyond gift wrapping.
description: Product Description Create Moments That Are Remembered Enocent – Where the Art of Giving Begins We believe every gift tells a story. Let our green shredded tissue paper set the scene for yours. Discover the effortless elegance that turns your thoughtful gifts into unforgettable presentations. Product Details & Product Specifications Type Green Shredded Paper Colour Green Size 100g Texture Soft, fluffy strands Ideal for Gift Boxes | Hampers | Gift Bags | Easter Baskets | Luxury Gift Baskets | Wedding Favours | Christmas Gifts | Birthday Presents | Anniversary Presents | Baby Shower | Special Occasions | Product Packaging | Small Business Crafted for a Luxurious Feel & Flawless Presentation We’ve selected a premium tissue paper that delivers a soft, fluffy texture, setting it apart from ordinary shredded fillers. This soft shredded paper acts as a protective cloud for delicate items, from fine jewellery to cherished keepsakes, ensuring they arrive in perfect condition while adding a tangible sense of luxury. Create Stunning Gift Presentations with Ease Elevate your gift-giving instantly. Simply place this soft shredded paper into your gift box or hamper before adding the present. It acts as the perfect hamper straw filling, adding volume, colour, and a professional finish that impresses every time. Endless Creative Possibilities Gift wrapping and box filling (e.g., shredded paper for gift boxes) Hamper and basket stuffing (e.g., hamper stuffing filler, shredded paper for hampers) Themed parties and events (e.g., wedding confetti, birthday gifts, Christmas decorations) Craft projects and DIY decorations Baby shower favours or Easter egg hunts Present Gifts Beautifully with Enocent Shredded Tissue Paper
